title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Program Brief: Oop Domain Services
summary: Deliver an extensible community-resource workflow with a domain core, replaceable boundaries, migrations, and operator evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop domain services increment in a production-shaped object-oriented capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.
Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
